title: Amtech S5550 Post box - black
features: DURABLE AND WATERPROOF: This attractive black post box is made from quality pressed steel with a waterproof epoxy powder coating
EASY TO MOUNT: With dimensions of 355mm (width) x 100mm (depth) x 355mm (height), the letter box has pre-drilled fixing holes for easy mounting
EASY TO HANDLE: Ergonomic build supports fatigue-free use
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1x Post box See more
